subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath named Amin and whom He hath clothed with the mantle of faithfulness and righteousness! In thy letter, great praise was offered regarding the Persian friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من سماک الله امینا و البسک رداء الامانه و التقی در نامه ستایش زیادی از یاران پارسی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
